title: Deviants
description: A mod that adds Nether and End Variants of different mobs in the game.
body:
![deviants banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e679f01ac839823408d699617f1672fe5d9b898d.png)
# Welcome to Deviants!
_4/26/25: I've decided to take back up development of Deviants and almost have an update for it with a lot of changes and fixes, and with new additions_

This mod essentially adds Nether and End variants/deviants of already existing Overworld Mobs. Also by adding Nether and End Mobs into other dimensions. Like a ghast in the End. Or an Enderman in the Nether (though those are already in there but I mean like a re-texture). Fun, right?

- All Nether variants/deviants will be hostile upon spotting you, some will light you on fire
- All End variants/deviants will be neutral, except for the already hostile monsters like skeletons and zombies, those will be hostile upon spotting you. Some will be able to teleport upon being hit.

I am always welcomed to suggestions, so join my discord and give me a suggestion on what mobs I should change next. 

[Use my code Kadeee1 for 25% off when buying your first server from BisectHosting]( https://bisecthosting.com/Kadeee1)
![bisecthosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2f88f55e03113db590d4e451aa9911a52c846e2.png)
